client_updates.highlight: Lodestar achieved devnet 4 interop with Lantern and ETH Lambda across multiple subnets
Signature aggregation redesign needed for devnet 5 to support attestation repacking
Lantern finalizing well with Lodestar and Grandine on devnet 4
Reem reports slow proof verification performance; benchmarking requested from other teams

testing_progress.highlight: Hive test framework integrating Lodestar, Lantern, Reem, ETH Lambda for RPC compatibility
Hive will test all client pairs for finalization and checkpoint sync compatibility
Devnet 4 running stable with 3 clients, single subnet; multi-subnet testing in progress

specification_updates.highlight: Extensive spec test vectors added for edge cases; good first issues opened for contributors
Test duration increased 2-3x due to recursive aggregation overhead in devnet 4
Production test vectors failing; likely need regeneration after post-quantum update

research_and_development.highlight: Post-quantum (Plonky3) integration progressing; SUM check optimizations coming
LeanVM now uses single commitment with batched SUM checks; simpler and recursion-friendly
Cryptography event scheduled for Rome in early May

organizational.highlight: Metrics PR to be merged by Friday this week for devnet 4 dashboard

action_items.action: Benchmark proof verification performance and report results
Add Hive test cases as spec test vectors for broader client consumption
Share networking/p2p/RPC test cases for inclusion in lean spec

decisions.decision: Devnet 5 will aggregate signatures into one per block; repacking mechanism TBD
Hive will test all client pair combinations for interoperability validation
Lean spec client will be source of truth for Hive test scenarios

targets.target: Friday this week - Merge devnet 4 metrics PR
Early May - Cryptography event in Rome
